scope: Google Search Console (bariatriccounselingcenter.com) + keyword master list. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility require SERP/manual data and are not auto-generated.
wins: Core San Antonio terms hold the top tier: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' at #1, 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at #2, 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' at #3.
'bariatric therapist' climbed to ~#8 (up ~34 spots, 5 impressions) and 'bariatric surgery counseling' sits at ~#4 nationally — the GLP-1/bariatric specialization lane is gaining.

Two blog posts carry the most search visibility: the hydration post (2,837 impressions, avg pos 9.0) and the weight-loss-medications explainer (2,424 impressions, avg pos 10.1) — strong page-1 informational footholds.
needs_attention: Coverage gap: only 20 of 67 tracked terms register any GSC impressions; 47 are invisible — most of these target staging12 service-page URLs that aren't live/indexed on www yet, so they cannot rank.
Visibility is drifting the wrong way: impression-weighted average position slipped from 14.9 (May 7) to 21.4 (June 3), and trailing-7-day impressions fell ~31% (2,447 → 1,681) over the same span.
Click-through is effectively zero — 2 clicks on 1,681 impressions this window. The two highest-impression pages are blog posts ranking at position 9-10 that aren't converting impressions to visits.

Specific rank slips on commercial terms: 'weight management therapist san antonio' fell to ~position 53 and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' to ~position 46 (both down 30+ spots vs. two weeks prior).
Note: at this traffic level many tracked terms show only 1-5 impressions, so single-impression position deltas swing sharply day to day — treat them as directional, not precise.
priority_actions: Publish/migrate the staging12 service pages to live www URLs so the 47 zero-impression tracked terms (weight management therapist, binge eating treatment, food addiction, GLP-1, McAllen, etc.) can actually be indexed and rank.

Capture the blog traffic: add prominent CTAs and internal links from the two high-impression posts (hydration; Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound/Mounjaro) into the matching service pages — this is the fastest lever on the near-zero CTR.

Investigate the position/impression drift: confirm whether it's seasonal or ranking loss, and run on-page refreshes on the slipped commercial terms ('weight management therapist san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio').
Defend the core local #1-#3 terms (bariatric surgery counseling SA, bariatric counseling SA, emotional eating therapy SA) — keep their pages fresh; these are BCC's strongest assets.
Add FAQ schema to live service pages to improve rich-result/AI-overview eligibility (the broad query set keeps surfacing long-tail impressions that aren't earning clicks).
summary: Core San Antonio rankings are strong (three terms at #1-#3), but the bigger picture is drifting: impression-weighted position slipped from ~15 to ~21 and 7-day impressions fell ~31% over four weeks, with near-zero CTR. The single biggest unlock is getting the 47 invisible tracked terms onto live, indexed pages — most point at staging12 URLs that can't rank yet.
